sections.paragraph:
- Original: καύσων

- Transliteration: Kauson

- Phonetic: kow'-sone

- Definition:

1. burning heat

a. of the sun

2. Eurus, a very dry hot, east wind, scorching and drying up everything

- Origin: from G2741

- TDNT entry: 13:44,4

- Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine

- Strong's: From G2741; a glare: - (burning) heat.
